tw-156.name: Gandalf
tw-156.text: Unique. +1 to all of his corruption checks. Gandalf may tap to test a gold ring in his company.

tw-120.name: Aragorn II
tw-120.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Rangers of the North faction. -3 marshalling points if eliminated.

tw-168.name: Legolas
tw-168.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Wood-elves faction.

tw-159.name: Gimli
tw-159.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Iron Hill Dwarves faction, +2 prowess against Orcs. +1 direct influence against Elves and Elf factions.

tw-152.name: Frodo
tw-152.text: Unique. Unless he is one of the starting characters, he may only be brought into play at his home site. All of his corruption checks are modified by +4. -2 marshalling points if eliminated.

tw-149.name: Faramir
tw-149.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Rangers of Ithilien faction.

tw-131.name: Bilbo
tw-131.text: Unique. Unless he is one of the starting characters, he may only be brought into play at his home site. All of his corruption checks are modified by +4. -2 marshalling points if eliminated.

tw-180.name: Sam Gamgee
tw-180.text: Unique. Unless he is one of the starting characters, he may only be brought into play at his home site. All of his corruption checks are modified by +3.

tw-126.name: Beorn
tw-126.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Beornings faction.

tw-182.name: Théoden
tw-182.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Riders of Rohan faction.

tw-145.name: Elrond
tw-145.text: Unique. When Elrond is at Rivendell, you may keep one more card than normal in your hand. -3 marshalling points if eliminated.

tw-136.name: Celeborn
tw-136.text: Unique. +5 direct influence that is only usable against Galadriel.

tw-147.name: Éowyn
tw-147.text: Unique. Against Nazgûl and Ringwraiths, +6 to her prowess and the Nazgûl/Ringwraith's body is halved (rounded up).

tw-127.name: Beregond
tw-127.text: Unique. -1 to all of his corruption checks. -1 to influence checks against factions.

tw-124.name: Bard Bowman
tw-124.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Men of Northern Rhovanion faction.

tw-118.name: Anborn
tw-118.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against the Men of Lebennin faction.

tw-244.name: Glamdring
tw-244.text: Unique. Weapon. +3 to prowess to a maximum of 8 (a maximum of 9 against Orcs).

tw-333.name: Sting
tw-333.text: Unique. Weapon. +1 to prowess to a maximum of 8, +2 to a Hobbit's prowess to a maximum of 8.

tw-347.name: The One Ring
tw-347.text: Unique. The One Ring. Playable only with a Gold Ring and after a test indicates The One Ring. +5 prowess (to a maximum of double the bearer's starting prowess). +5 to body (to a maximum of 10). +5 to direct influence. Bearer may make a corruption check modified by -2 to cancel a strike against himself; this does not work against Undead and Nazgûl strikes. +1 corruption point to every character in the bearer's company.

tw-345.name: The Mithril-coat
tw-345.text: Unique. Armor. +3 to body (to a maximum of 10).

tw-206.name: Dagger of Westernesse
tw-206.text: Weapon. +1 to prowess to a maximum of 8.

tw-259.name: Horn of Anor
tw-259.text: +2 to direct influence against factions. Cannot be duplicated on a given character.

tw-251.name: Gwaihir
tw-251.text: Unique. Playable at Eagles' Eyrie. If his company's size is two or less, you may discard Gwaihir during the organization phase to allow his company to move to any site that is not in a Shadow-land, Dark-domain, or Under-deeps; only hazard creatures keyed to the site may be played on a company that moves in this fashion.

tw-326.name: Shadowfax
tw-326.text: Unique. Playable at Edoras or Dunharrow. If his company has only one character or one character and a Hobbit at the end of the movement/hazard phase, tap Shadowfax to allow his company to immediately move again; an additional site card may be played and an additional movement/hazard phase follows for that company.

tw-311.name: Rangers of the North
tw-311.text: Unique. Playable at Bree if the influence check is greater than 9. Standard Modifications: Dúnedain (+1).

tw-317.name: Riders of Rohan
tw-317.text: Unique. Playable at Edoras if the influence check is greater than 9. Standard Modifications: Hobbits (+1), Dúnedain (+1).

tw-263.name: Knights of Dol Amroth
tw-263.text: Unique. Playable at Dol Amroth if the influence check is greater than 8. Standard Modifications: Dúnedain (+1).

tw-243.name: Gates of Morning
tw-243.text: Environment. When Gates of Morning is played, all environment hazard cards in play are immediately discarded, and all hazard environment effects are canceled. Cannot be duplicated.

tw-335.name: Sun
tw-335.text: Environment. The prowess of each Dúnadan is modified by +1. Additionally, if Gates of Morning is in play, the prowess of each automatic-attack and hazard creature is modified by -1 and the prowess of each Man and Dúnadan is modified by +1. Cannot be duplicated.

tw-020.name: Cave-drake
tw-020.text: Dragon. Two strikes. Attacker chooses defending characters.

tw-015.name: Barrow-wight
tw-015.text: Undead. One strike. After the attack, each character wounded by Barrow-wight makes a corruption check modified by -2.

tw-28.name: Doors of Night
tw-28.text: Environment. When Doors of Night is played, all resource environment cards in play are immediately discarded, and all resource environment effects are canceled. Cannot be duplicated.

tw-32.name: Eye of Sauron
tw-32.text: The prowess of each automatic-attack is increased by one. Alternatively, if Doors of Night is in play, the prowess of each automatic-attack is increased by three.

tw-108.name: Wake of War
tw-108.text: The number of strikes and prowess of each Wolf, Spider, and Animal attack are each increased by one (by two for Wolf attacks if Doors of Night is in play). Cannot be duplicated.

tw-106.name: Twilight
tw-106.text: Environment. One environment card (in play or declared earlier in the same chain of effects) is canceled and discarded. Twilight may also be played as a resource, may be played at any point during any player's turn and does not count against the hazard limit.

tw-421.name: Rivendell
tw-421.text: Site Path From Lórien: Wilderness/Border-land/Wilderness/Wilderness. Site Path From Grey Havens: Free-domain/Wilderness/Wilderness.

tw-408.name: Lórien
tw-408.text: Site Path From Rivendell: Wilderness/Wilderness/Border-land/Wilderness. Site Path From Edhellond: Wilderness/Border-land/Free-domain/Free-domain/Border-land/Wilderness.

tw-393.name: Edhellond
tw-393.text: Site Path From Grey Havens: Free-domain/Coastland/Coastland/Coastland/Coastland/Wilderness. Site Path From Lórien: Wilderness/Border-land/Free-domain/Free-domain/Border-land/Wilderness.

tw-399.name: Grey Havens
tw-399.text: Site Path From Rivendell: Wilderness/Wilderness/Free-domain. Site Path From Edhellond: Wilderness/Coastland/Coastland/Coastland/Coastland/Free-domain.

tw-413.name: Moria
tw-413.text: Playable: Items (minor, major, greater, gold ring). Automatic-attacks: Orcs — 4 strikes with 7 prowess.

tw-414.name: Mount Doom
tw-414.text: Any company moving to this site has its hazard limit increased by 2 and hazard creatures may always be played keyed to the site regardless of any other cards played.

tw-395.name: Ettenmoors
tw-395.text: Playable: Items (minor). Automatic-attacks: Troll — 1 strike with 9 prowess.

tw-375.name: Barrow-downs
tw-375.text: Playable: Items (minor, major). Automatic-attacks: Undead — 1 strike with 8 prowess; each character wounded must make a corruption check.

tw-417.name: Old Forest
tw-417.text: Healing effects affect all characters at the site.

as-4.name: Perchen
as-4.text: Unique. +3 direct influence against any faction playable at Dunnish Clan-hold.

as-3.name: Mionid
as-3.text: Unique. +2 direct influence against any faction playable at Variag Camp.

as-169.name: Weathertop
as-169.text: Playable: Information. Automatic-attacks: Wolves — 2 strikes with 6 prowess.

le-24.name: The Mouth
le-24.text: Unique. Manifestation of Mouth of Sauron. +2 direct influence against any faction. Tap during your organization phase to move one resource or character from your discard pile to your play deck and reshuffle.

le-21.name: Lieutenant of Dol Guldur
le-21.text: Unique. Olog-hai. Leader. Manifestation of Gorfaur the Lame. Discard on a body check result of 9. +2 direct influence against Trolls, Orcs, Troll factions, and Orc factions. When he is at Dol Guldur, you may keep one more card than normal in your hand.

le-11.name: Gorbag
le-11.text: Unique. Uruk-hai. Leader. Discard on a body check result of 9. +3 direct influence against Orcs and Orc factions.

le-39.name: Shagrat
le-39.text: Unique. Uruk-hai. Leader. Discard on a body check result of 9. +4 direct influence against Orcs and Orc factions.

le-299.name: Black Mace
le-299.text: Weapon. Warrior only: +3 prowess to a maximum of 10 (+4 to a maximum of 10 against Elves).

le-313.name: High Helm
le-313.text: Unique. Helmet. +2 to direct influence. +1 to body to a maximum of 9. Warrior only: +1 to prowess to a maximum of 8.

le-342.name: Saw-toothed Blade
le-342.text: Weapon. +1 to prowess to a maximum of 8.

le-328.name: Orc-draughts
le-328.text: Discard to give +1 prowess to all characters in bearer's company until the end of the turn.

le-265.name: Goblins of Goblin-gate
le-265.text: Unique. Playable at Goblin-gate if the influence check is greater than 8. Standard Modifications: Grey Mountain Goblins (+2).

le-158.name: The Warg-king
le-158.text: Unique. Playable at any tapped or untapped Ruins & Lairs with a Wolf automatic-attack. Tap to cancel a Wolf or Animal attack against his company. +2 to any influence attempt by a character in his company against a Wolf faction.

le-367.name: Dol Guldur
le-367.text: Any gold ring stored at this site is automatically tested (modify the roll by -2). Any attack against a minion company at this site is canceled.

le-390.name: Minas Morgul
le-390.text: Any gold ring stored at this site is automatically tested (modify the roll by -2). Any attack against a minion company at this site is canceled.

le-373.name: Ettenmoors
le-373.text: Playable: Items (minor). Automatic-attacks (2): (1st) Troll — 1 strike with 9 prowess; (2nd) Wolves — 2 strikes with 8 prowess.

le-412.name: The White Towers
le-412.text: Playable: Information. Automatic-attacks: Wolves — 2 strikes with 6 prowess.

wh-75.name: Hidden Haven
wh-75.text: Playable on a non-Dragon's lair Ruins & Lairs in a Wilderness, Border-land, or Shadow-land. This site becomes one of your Wizardhavens and loses all automatic-attacks. Nothing is considered playable as written on the site card. If one of your companies is at this site, all attacks against it are canceled.

wh-82.name: Thrall of the Voice
wh-82.text: Instead of a normal character, during your organization phase you may bring into play one character (including a minion agent) with up to a 6 mind. Place this card with the character. -1 to his mind to a minimum of 1. Such a character may also be in your starting company.

wh-58.name: The White Towers
wh-58.text: If one of your companies is at this site, all attacks against it are canceled.

ba-2.name: Azog
ba-2.text: Unique. Balrog specific. Leader. Discard on a body check result of 9. +3 direct influence against Orcs and Orc factions. +2 direct influence against Balrog specific characters.

ba-4.name: Bolg
ba-4.text: Unique. Balrog specific. Leader. Discard on a body check result of 9. +3 direct influence against Orcs and Orc factions. +2 direct influence against Balrog specific characters.

ba-93.name: Moria
ba-93.text: Any gold ring stored at this site is automatically tested (modify the roll by -2). Creatures keyed to this site are detainment. If one of your companies is at this site, all attacks against it are canceled.

ba-100.name: The Under-gates
ba-100.text: Any gold ring stored at this site is automatically tested (modify the roll by -2). Creatures keyed to this site attack as detainment. If one of your companies is at this site, all attacks against it are canceled.
